scenarios.title: Black Four-Move Smoke
scenarios.purpose: UI tests drive Black through four moves while the scenario supplies deterministic White moves.

scenarios.title: Fool's Mate
scenarios.purpose: Replays a short checkmate to verify terminal status, alert presentation, and move-list updates.

scenarios.title: Insufficient Material Position
scenarios.purpose: Starts from a FEN-backed king-versus-king position to verify automatic insufficient-material draw handling.

scenarios.title: Promotion To Queen
scenarios.purpose: Starts from a FEN-backed position and promotes a pawn to verify PGN promotion replay.

scenarios.title: Ruy Lopez Long Replay
scenarios.purpose: Exercises repeated board, status, move-list, and replay updates over a longer opening line.

scenarios.title: Castling And En Passant
scenarios.purpose: Exercises castling and en passant SAN through automatic scenario replay.

scenarios.title: Stalemate Position
scenarios.purpose: Starts from a FEN-backed stalemate to verify zero-move terminal scenarios.

scenarios.title: Suggestion Line
scenarios.purpose: Provides deterministic ranked suggestion arrows from the scenario's future White moves.

scenarios.title: White Four-Move Smoke
scenarios.purpose: UI tests drive White through four moves while the scenario supplies deterministic Black replies.
